# Ornamental Fan

## Observed Text

- Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 4 Block.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Best with 0-cost and draw attacks such as Flash of Steel, Pommel Strike, Pact's End, Twin Strike, and Rage turns; count attack plays before spending block energy.
- Do not assume attacks played automatically by Cascade will satisfy Fan on a lethal block turn; verify the live block/relic counter before relying on it.
